data.description: FUTURE MIGRATION — out of contract 9f72697 scope (no AC IDs). Origin: Dependabot PR #48 (rmcp 1.6->2.2) bulk-merged 2026-07-10, broke main, reverted in PR #63. Observed breakage: falcon-mcp no longer compiles — E0432 unresolved import rmcp::model::Content; both CI jobs red (TS job builds the Rust binary for e2e). Prior art: May 2026 memory — rmcp 1.x already had breaking tool-result drift, so treat the 2.x API as a deliberate migration, not a version bump. Scope: migrate falcon-mcp to current rmcp 2.x (model/Content module moves, tool-result types, server wiring in server.rs), update Cargo.toml/lock, adapt tool handlers. Gates: cargo build/test/clippy (all three README invocations)/fmt green; scripts/check-planted-defects.sh untouched (G-1: falcon-agent planted defects are workshop material); full e2e cassette replay green (npm run test:full). Serialization: Cargo.toml + server.rs groups. Size: L.
data.title: Migrate rmcp 1.6 to 2.x in falcon-mcp

provenance.reason: Operator-requested minting of future tickets for the three majors reverted in PR #63

data.body: PR opened: https://github.com/mrojas54/maltese-agent/pull/67 (head fa1870d, base main). rmcp 1.6.0 -> 2.2.0 migration; blast radius: Content -> ContentBlock in tool_error.rs (Internal result-level branch) plus Cargo.toml/lock bump. Gates: fmt clean (H-1); clippy -p falcon-mcp --all-targets -D warnings clean (H-2); cargo test --workspace --all-targets 122/122 (H-3); check-planted-defects.sh 17/17 PASS, G-1 intact (H-8); npm run test:full 153/153 incl. full-pipeline cassette replay against the rmcp 2.2 binary.

provenance.reason: MA-30 executed in operator-initiated worktree session; all ticket gates green, PR #67 awaiting operator merge
